description: AnalysisDataFlow 核心术语库 (v4.0国际化)

terms.definition: 对无界数据流进行实时计算的处理模式
terms.definition_en: A processing pattern for real-time computation on unbounded data streams

usage_examples.zh: 流处理系统能够实时分析用户行为数据
usage_examples.en: Stream Processing systems can analyze user behavior data in real-time

terms.definition: 对有界数据集进行离线计算的模式
terms.definition_en: A processing pattern for offline computation on bounded datasets

usage_examples.zh: 批处理适用于大规模历史数据分析
usage_examples.en: Batch Processing is suitable for large-scale historical data analysis

terms.definition: 分布式系统的全局一致性快照
terms.definition_en: A globally consistent snapshot of a distributed system state

usage_examples.zh: Flink通过周期性检查点实现容错
usage_examples.en: Flink achieves fault tolerance through periodic Checkpoints

terms.definition: 表示事件时间进展的时间戳标记
terms.definition_en: A timestamp marker indicating the progress of event time

usage_examples.zh: 水印用于处理乱序事件
usage_examples.en: Watermarks are used to handle out-of-order events

terms.definition: 将流数据切分为有界集合的逻辑边界
terms.definition_en: A logical boundary that divides stream data into bounded sets
terms.notes: 具体窗口类型应使用完整名称如Tumbling Window, Sliding Window

usage_examples.zh: 窗口操作将无限流转换为有限批
usage_examples.en: Windowing operations convert infinite streams into finite batches

terms.definition: 每条记录被处理且仅被处理一次的语义保证
terms.definition_en: A semantic guarantee that each record is processed exactly one time

usage_examples.zh: Flink提供端到端恰好一次保证
usage_examples.en: Flink provides end-to-end Exactly-Once guarantees

terms.definition: 每条记录至少被处理一次的语义保证
terms.definition_en: A semantic guarantee that each record is processed at least one time

usage_examples.zh: 至少一次语义允许重复处理
usage_examples.en: At-Least-Once semantics allow duplicate processing

terms.definition: 每条记录最多被处理一次的语义保证
terms.definition_en: A semantic guarantee that each record is processed at most one time

usage_examples.zh: 最多一次语义可能导致数据丢失
usage_examples.en: At-Most-Once semantics may lead to data loss

terms.definition: 消费者向生产者反馈处理能力的机制
terms.definition_en: A mechanism where consumers signal their processing capacity to producers

usage_examples.zh: 背压防止系统因过载而崩溃
usage_examples.en: Backpressure prevents system overload and crashes

terms.definition: 流计算中有状态算子的状态维护机制
terms.definition_en: The mechanism for maintaining state of stateful operators in stream computation

usage_examples.zh: 状态管理是流处理的核心挑战
usage_examples.en: State Management is a core challenge in stream processing

terms.definition: 数据产生的时间戳
terms.definition_en: The timestamp when the data was originally generated

usage_examples.zh: 事件时间反映了数据实际发生的时间
usage_examples.en: Event Time reflects when the event actually occurred

terms.definition: 数据被处理的时间戳
terms.definition_en: The timestamp when the data is being processed

usage_examples.zh: 处理时间是最简单但最不准确的时间语义
usage_examples.en: Processing Time is the simplest but least accurate time semantics

terms.definition: 数据进入系统的时间戳
terms.definition_en: The timestamp when data enters the processing system

usage_examples.zh: 摄取时间是事件时间和处理时间的折中
usage_examples.en: Ingestion Time is a compromise between Event and Processing Time

terms.definition: 基于消息传递的并发计算模型
terms.definition_en: A concurrency model based on message passing
terms.notes: 首字母大写表示模型概念

usage_examples.zh: Actor模型强调隔离和异步消息传递
usage_examples.en: The Actor Model emphasizes isolation and asynchronous message passing

terms.definition: Hoare提出的并发形式化语言
terms.definition_en: A formal language for concurrency proposed by C.A.R. Hoare

usage_examples.zh: Go语言的channel机制源于CSP
usage_examples.en: Go's channel mechanism is derived from CSP

terms.definition: 进程间通过发送/接收消息通信的方式
terms.definition_en: Inter-process communication via send/receive messages

usage_examples.zh: 消息传递避免了共享内存的竞态条件
usage_examples.en: Message Passing avoids race conditions of shared memory

terms.definition: 进程通过共享内存区域通信的方式
terms.definition_en: Inter-process communication via a shared memory region

usage_examples.zh: 共享内存需要同步机制防止竞态条件
usage_examples.en: Shared Memory requires synchronization to prevent race conditions

terms.definition: CSP中进程间通信的管道
terms.definition_en: A communication pipe between processes in CSP

usage_examples.zh: 信道是CSP中的核心抽象
usage_examples.en: Channel is the core abstraction in CSP

terms.definition: 描述并发进程行为的形式化语言
terms.definition_en: A formal language for describing concurrent process behavior

usage_examples.zh: 进程演算为并发系统提供了严格的数学基础
usage_examples.en: Process Calculus provides rigorous mathematical foundations for concurrent systems

terms.definition: 验证进程等价关系的形式化方法
terms.definition_en: A formal method for verifying process equivalence relations

usage_examples.zh: 双模拟是进程等价性的最强形式
usage_examples.en: Bisimulation is the strongest form of process equivalence

terms.definition: 基于可观测行为迹的等价关系
terms.definition_en: An equivalence relation based on observable behavior traces

usage_examples.zh: 迹等价比双模拟更弱但更容易验证
usage_examples.en: Trace Equivalence is weaker than Bisimulation but easier to verify

terms.definition: 为程序赋予类型以确保正确性的规则集
terms.definition_en: A set of rules that assigns types to programs to ensure correctness

usage_examples.zh: 强类型系统能在编译时捕获错误
usage_examples.en: Strong Type Systems can catch errors at compile time

terms.definition: 描述通信协议的类型系统
terms.definition_en: A type system for describing communication protocols

usage_examples.zh: 会话类型确保通信协议的正确性
usage_examples.en: Session Types ensure correctness of communication protocols

terms.definition: 描述数据流动和转换的抽象模型
terms.definition_en: An abstract model describing data flow and transformation
terms.notes: Dataflow Model特指Google Dataflow论文中的模型

usage_examples.zh: Dataflow模型统一了批处理和流处理
usage_examples.en: The Dataflow Model unifies batch and stream processing

terms.definition: 流计算中的基本处理单元
terms.definition_en: The basic processing unit in stream computation

usage_examples.zh: map和filter是常用的算子
usage_examples.en: map and filter are commonly used Operators

terms.definition: 数据流的输入端
terms.definition_en: The input endpoint of a data stream
terms.notes: 保留英文，但在解释时可使用'数据源'

usage_examples.zh: KafkaSource从Kafka读取数据
usage_examples.en: KafkaSource reads data from Kafka

terms.definition: 数据流的输出端
terms.definition_en: The output endpoint of a data stream
terms.notes: 保留英文，但在解释时可使用'数据汇'

usage_examples.zh: JDBC Sink将数据写入数据库
usage_examples.en: JDBC Sink writes data to database

terms.definition: 具有明确开始和结束的数据集
terms.definition_en: A dataset with definite beginning and end

usage_examples.zh: 历史日志是有界数据的典型例子
usage_examples.en: Historical logs are typical examples of Bounded Data

terms.definition: 持续产生、没有明确结束的数据流
terms.definition_en: A data stream that is continuously generated without definite end

usage_examples.zh: 实时传感器数据是无界数据
usage_examples.en: Real-time sensor data is Unbounded Data

terms.definition: 存储和访问流处理状态的机制
terms.definition_en: The mechanism for storing and accessing stream processing state

usage_examples.zh: RocksDB State Backend适合大状态场景
usage_examples.en: RocksDB State Backend is suitable for large state scenarios
